Name: ShopLineupParam
Description: Defines parameters relating to NPC shops and boss soul exchanges.

Fields.Name: Enable Flag
Fields.Description: The item is visible when this flag is ON.

Fields.Name: Disable Flag
Fields.Description: The item is not visible when this flag is ON.

Fields.Name: Duplicate Item ID
Fields.Description: Remove all sources of this item if purchased from other vendors.

Fields.Name: Price Rate
Fields.Description: The percentage of the base price the item costs.
